name: learning-accelerator
description: A reusable general learning agent skill with JSON persistence, CLI tooling, optional system prompt, review memory, spaced repetition, task-driven learning, exercise generation, error diagnosis, and adaptive difficulty.
compatible_with: custom agents that can load markdown instructions

install.as_skill: Copy this directory into the agent's skills directory and ensure SKILL.md is loaded as the skill entry.
install.as_codex_skill: Use Codex skill-installer with the published GitHub repository URL, then restart Codex.
install.as_skills_sh: After public indexing, install with npx skills add <owner>/Learning-Accelerator and discover with npx skills find learning accelerator.
install.as_codex_local_dev: For local development only, copy this directory into ~/.codex/skills/learning-accelerator.
install.as_claude_code_skill: Copy this directory into ~/.claude/skills/learning-accelerator or use CLAUDE.md as project memory.
install.as_gemini_project_guide: Keep GEMINI.md in the repository root and load SYSTEM_PROMPT.md when full instructions are needed.
install.as_agent_guide: Point AGENTS.md-compatible coding agents at AGENTS.md for project-level instructions.
install.as_system_prompt: Use SYSTEM_PROMPT.md as the agent's system or developer instruction when the platform has no skill loader.

distribution.github_source: Repository root is the skill root because SKILL.md is at the top level.
distribution.codex_skill_installer: Use when the repository URL is known and the user is working inside Codex.
distribution.skills_sh: Use npx skills find for discovery and npx skills add for cross-agent installation after public indexing.
